title: ridsdalea leytensis
intro: Ridsdalea leytensis is a rare and endangered plant species native to the Philippines, classified as a type of flowering plant in the family Staphylocarpidae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ridsdalea leytensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to develop new treatments for various diseases.
